message:
conformance(linalg): expand FNP-P2C-008 fixture breadth for qr/svd/lstsq policy matrix

Broaden packet-008 linalg corpus coverage by adding deterministic differential,
metamorphic, and adversarial fixture cases that increase exercised shape modes,
relation contracts, and fail-closed policy guardrails.

Differential additions:
- linalg_qr_shapes_r_mode_3x5
- linalg_qr_shapes_raw_mode_4x2
- linalg_svd_shapes_reduced_3x5
- linalg_lstsq_shapes_vector_rhs

Metamorphic additions:
- linalg_solve_homogeneous_scaling_negative_scalar
- linalg_qr_repeat_deterministic_raw
- linalg_lstsq_rhs_column_growth_square

Adversarial additions:
- linalg_tolerance_search_depth_exceeded
- linalg_backend_revalidation_budget_exceeded
- linalg_policy_unknown_class

Validation run for this commit candidate:
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fnp-conformance linalg_ -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_test_contract_gate
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
- UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --diff

All checks passed; linalg suites are green in differential/metamorphic/adversarial
contract gates.

Refs: bd-1wfy

+    "operation": "backend_bridge",

+    "mode": "strict",
